text.cn: 導遊式餐廳把『必吃西湖醋魚』推到你面前。菜單只有小程序，價格模糊……
text.en: A touristy restaurant pushes 'must-try vinegar fish'. Menu is mini-program only; prices are suspiciously vague...

text.cn: 掃碼點一份『招牌醋魚』，用移動支付結帳。
text.en: Scan-order the signature fish and pay by mobile.

feedback.cn: 味道一言難盡。胃與錢包同時受創，但你完成了『打卡』。
feedback.en: The taste is... memorable. Stomach and wallet both hurt, but you checked the box.

text.cn: 用手機查本地攻略（有號才能順利打開評論區驗證碼）。
text.en: Search local tips (SMS verification helps open review apps).

lockedHint.cn: 需要國內手機號以通過 App 驗證
lockedHint.en: Requires local number for app verification

feedback.cn: 評論區高喊『別點醋魚』。你改吃片兒川，救回了部分 San 值。
feedback.en: Reviews scream 'skip the fish'. You switch to pian'er chuan and save some sanity.

text.cn: 拒絕小程序，改去路邊買龍井茶炒豆。
text.en: Refuse the mini-program; buy Longjing tea snacks from a street stall.

feedback.cn: 便宜、安全、沒有『美食沙漠』詛咒。你對杭州的印象好轉了一點。
feedback.en: Cheap, safe, no 'food desert' curse. Hangzhou's reputation recovers slightly.

text.cn: 西湖很美。胃的記憶則因人而異。
text.en: West Lake is beautiful. Your stomach's memories may vary.
